response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: r1c5 is the lowest-SoC peer in systemic crisis; minimal 0.5 kWh share aligns with emergency-only policy and preserves own survival margin above share_min_soc_frac threshold.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r1c5. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=['r2c4'].
Your latest belief: Microgrid in systemic energy crisis; all peers in deficit. r1c4 SoC critically low (11%). r2c4 actively blocking shares despite requests. Prioritize own survival; minimal emergency-only sharing to lowest-SoC peer (r1c5 at ~10% implied). Expect grid recovery signal or prepare for load shedding..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
